narrative:
Union (precinct in Highland County) has 1,239 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.7 percentage points.
